title: alifana canescens
side_effects: Alifana canescens can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. In rare cases, it may also cause gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. The improper use of this plant can also lead to interactions with other medications, resulting in adverse reactions. Furthermore, overconsumption of alifana canescens can cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals.
